title: 7B22--VISN 15 | PYXIS SERVER UPGRADE
name: 7B22--VISN 15 | PYXIS SERVER UPGRADE
statement_of_work: Carefusion Solutions, LLC, will provide the Pyxis Server Upgrades to the existing Pyxis supply systems. The Pyxis system is proprietary and may only be upgraded by Carefusion Solutions, LLC.
deliverables: Carefusion Solutions, LLC, will provide the Pyxis Server Upgrades to the existing Pyxis supply systems
The capabilities statement must provide clear and unambiguous evidence to substantiate the capability of the party to provide the required services
If after 05/06/2026, no viable responses have been received in response to this announcement, the Department of Veterans Affairs shall negotiate solely with Carefusion Solutions, LLC
